summary: Completed comprehensive testing of booking and request workflow with notification system and feature toggles. All key workflows tested successfully including backend API functionality and frontend UI integration.

minor_issues.issue: Update endpoints return success message instead of updated object
minor_issues.impact: Requires additional API call to verify updates

passed_tests: Settings feature toggles (experiences_enabled, requests_enabled) present and functional
Settings toggle updates work correctly via API
Booking creation workflow creates pending bookings with timeline events
Request creation workflow creates pending requests with timeline events
Booking approval workflow updates status and creates timeline events
Request acknowledgment workflow processes correctly (acknowledged -> in_progress transition)
Bookings and requests retrieval endpoints working
Admin settings page displays feature toggle switches correctly
Feature toggles hide/show modules on guest home page as expected
Guest home page respects backend settings for module visibility
Navigation between guest home, experiences, and admin pages works
Admin authentication and settings save functionality works
End-to-end workflow: Admin toggles → Backend settings → Frontend display
